---
title: "Reproducibility"
format: html

previous:
  href: "Modular-Useful features.html"
  text: "Other Useful Features"

next:
  href: "Modular-Reusable.html"
  text: "Making Quarto OERs Reusable"
---

Computational reproducibility ensures others can:

-   rerun code;

-   regenerate equations, tables, and figures;

-   practically learn;

-   repurpose and build upon an OER;

-   test claims.

To support reproducibility:

-   include datasets or provide download links;

-   avoid hard coded paths;

-   document dependencies.

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-alt="Go to next page: Modular-Reusable.html" fig-align="center" width="50"}](/Modular%20OERs/Modular-Reusable.html)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: nav-footer
```{=html}
<a href="{{< meta previous.href >}}" aria-label="Go to previous page: {{< meta previous.text >}}">
  <span aria-hidden="true">«</span> {{< meta previous.text >}}
</a>

<a href="{{< meta next.href >}}" aria-label="Go to next page: {{< meta next.text >}}">
  {{< meta next.text >}} <span aria-hidden="true">»</span>
</a>
```
:::
